title: Travel Dates FY26
content:
Anticipated Travel Dates for 2025-2026 (arrivals & departures)
Wednesday, August 13, 2025
Student leaders and select varsity athletes move in.
Orientation & Move In – August 16 & 17, 2025
More specific schedules and dates around orientation and move-in will be
released later this spring
Family Day Activities– October 3, 2025
Fall Break – October 4-8, 2025
Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, October 3.
Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Wednesday, October 8.
Classes will resume on Thursday, October 9.
Thanksgiving Break - November 22-30, 2025
Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, November 21.
Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Sunday, November 30.
Classes resume on Monday, December 1.
Winter Break - December 20, 2025 – January 5, 2026
Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, December 19.
Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Monday, January 5.
Classes resume on Tuesday, January 6.
February Break - February 14-18, 2026
Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, February 13.
Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Wednesday, February 18.
Classes resume on Thursday, February 19.
Spring Break – March 28 – April 12, 2026
Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, March 27.
Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Sunday, April 12.
Classes resume on Monday, April 13.
End of 2025-2026 Academic Year
Last day of academic program for grades 9-11 is Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 2:00 p.m.
Commencement is Saturday, May 30, 2026.
All students are required to attend the end of year ceremonies including commencement.
Students may depart campus after their last commitment on Saturday, May 30, 2026
